description:
🕒 16:00–18:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-ikimonobu-tenranzan-summer/

Walk with a guide and discover the natural changes you might normally miss on an everyday stroll. This is a short, easy-to-enjoy tour—please join us casually. Depending on the season, you may receive homemade pesticide-free vegetables as a gift!

【Fee】
¥2,000 per person, ¥1,500 for repeat visitors, ¥4,000 per family (includes guide and insurance)

【Capacity】
10 people per session

【Guide】
Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno City Eco-Tourism Citizen Guides Association, Wildlife Division)

【What to bring】
Beverage, rain gear, backpack (something that keeps your hands free is recommended), towel, insect repellent spray
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
summary: Easy Evening Tenranzan Tour – Explore Nature's Changes with a Guide
